framework.name: Supervisor-Subagent Payment Delegation (Single-Hop Only)
framework.description: Visa's reference architecture uses supervisor→subagent delegation where the cart manager agent handles payments, but authorization still flows back to the human. No evidence of multi-hop agent-to-agent auth chains. The delegation is orchestration-level, not cryptographic.
framework.raw_quote: The supervisor acts as the central orchestrator... The cart manager handles shopping cart operations, payment processing, and purchase flow

source.title: Introducing Visa Intelligent Commerce on AWS: Enabling agentic commerce with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore | Artificial Intelligence
